# 20th Street Auto Service Inc

> Full-service auto repair in Boca Raton, FL. Honest, affordable car maintenance and repair for all makes and models.

## Contact
- Phone: (561) 465-5512
- Email: service@20thstreetautoservice.com
- Address: 1990 N Dixie Hwy, Boca Raton, FL 33432
- Website: https://20th-street-auto-production.up.railway.app/

## Hours
Mo-Fr 08:00-17:00, Sa 08:00-14:00

## Services
  - General Repair
  - Oil Changes
  - Brake Service
  - Engine Diagnostics
  - A/C Repair
  - Tire Service

## Service Area
- Primary: Boca Raton, FL
- Also serving: greater Boca Raton metropolitan area
